client_updates.highlight: Zeam: 32-node, 4-subnet all-Zeam Shadow network running to finality; QUIC P2P multi-threaded, stabilization expected in 1-2 days
Ream: interoping successfully with Ethlambda on one subnet; plan to add Zeam, Lantern, and Grandine for 24-validator DevNet 5 runs
Lantern: avg Type 2 proof generation ~2.8s on Xeon/8-core; finality gaps when block building exceeds 10s; adding subnets and clients next
Ethlambda: updated attestations to use current head's latest justified as source; added flag to disable Syngate mechanism that caused non-finality; working on pre-build optimization
Gean: stable multi-client runs with no SSZ regressions; Shadow Network Simulator integration in progress

testing_progress.highlight: Ethlambda: finality lags observed (~30 slots at a time) with 16 nodes on a 32-thread machine; CPU is the primary bottleneck
Ethlambda confirmed Shadow-compatible; Zeam will begin interop Shadow sims with Ethlambda before next call
Lantern confirmed its new libp2p library is Shadow-compatible; will submit a PR for Shadow simulator support
Root cause of finality lag identified as recursive proof aggregation during block proposal, not XMSS row signatures

spec_and_cryptography.highlight: Lean spec cleanup complete; no major changes expected; internal EF spec review meeting planned for next week
Zeam to PR revert of Ethlambda's earlier vote-packing optimization (now redundant after latest-justified store PR merge)
EF team exploring binary fields as proving system to potentially replace Poseidon in the future
Proposed path: increase slot time in spec (from 4s to 6-8s) to unblock scaling on commodity hardware; revisit in a few months as performance improves

action_items.action: Post a DevNet 5 issues list to the DevNet 5 channel: include interop blockers, finality problems, validator counts, and proof aggregation status
Client teams wishing to join Shadow sims should implement sleep/simulated-time config at heavy computation points; contact Zeam (Parthasarathy/Kai) for config details

decisions.decision: Zeam (Anshal) will PR to revert Ethlambda's earlier vote-packing spec change, as it is now redundant following the latest-justified store PR merge
Increase DevNet 5 slot time in the lean spec (currently 4s) to resolve proof aggregation bottleneck on commodity hardware; exact value TBD

targets.target: Zeam: begin multi-client DevNets by end of this week
Goal: run a month-long stable DevNet with 100+ (ideally 1000+) validators before end of year
